title.en: Enforce Remote Wipe Capability on Portable End-User Devices

prose.en: Remotely wipe enterprise data from enterprise-owned portable end-user devices when deemed appropriate such as lost or stolen devices, or when an individual no longer supports the enterprise.
Enterprise data is wiped from enterprise-owned portable end-user devices when deemed appropriate.

example.en: Example situations include when devices are lost or stolen, or when an individual no longer supports the enterprise.
